error.title: Couldn't load economy
error.description: Something went wrong loading this household's economy. Try again in a moment.

setup.title: Set up your economy
setup.description: Choose when each budget period begins. You can change this later.

currency.label: Currency
currency.hint: Hemma works in SEK. This can't be changed.

cycleStartDay.label: Cycle start day
cycleStartDay.hint: The day of the month each budget period starts (1–28).

categories.title: Your starter categories
categories.description: These categories were created automatically. You can add or change them later.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Spending and savings accounts in this household.

empty.title: No accounts yet
empty.description: Add a spending or savings account to start tracking balances.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize spending into categories and subcategories.
categories.maxDepthHint: Subcategories can't have their own subcategories.

budgetable.label: Budgeted
budgetable.hint: Budgeted categories get a budget line. Turn off for tracked-only categories.

empty.title: No categories
empty.description: Add a category to organize spending.

budget.title: Budget
budget.description: Plan spending for each category this period.

empty.title: Nothing to budget yet
empty.description: Add budgeted categories to plan spending for this period.

emptyPeriod.title: Empty budget
emptyPeriod.description: No budget lines for this period yet. Set amounts below, or copy from the previous period.

record.title: Record transaction

receipt.label: Receipt
receipt.hint: PDF, PNG or JPEG, up to 10 MB.
receipt.errorType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, PNG or JPEG.
receipt.errorSize: File is too large. Max 10 MB.

record.receiptFailed: Transaction saved, but the receipt didn't upload. Try attaching it again.

empty.title: No transactions
empty.description: Record a transaction to see it here.

searchEmpty.title: No matches
searchEmpty.description: No transaction notes match your search.

savings.label: Record as savings
savings.hint: Books this as a savings allocation under Sparande instead of a neutral movement.

empty.title: Not enough accounts
empty.description: Add at least two accounts to transfer between them.

recurring.title: Recurring bills
recurring.description: Manage fixed and estimated bills that repeat each period.

inbox.title: Awaiting confirmation
inbox.description: Estimated bills posted an amount — confirm the real amount to book them.

empty.title: No recurring bills
empty.description: Add a recurring bill to track fixed and estimated payments.

form.title: Add recurring bill
form.description: Set up a bill that repeats monthly.

type.label: Type
type.estimatedHint: An estimate you confirm with the real amount each period.

rules.title: Categorization rules
rules.description: Automatically categorize imported transactions by matching their text.
rules.capHint: You've reached the enabled-rule limit. Disable a rule to enable another.

empty.title: No rules yet
empty.description: Add a rule to auto-categorize transactions as you import them.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this rule?
deleteConfirm.description: The rule matching “{pattern}” will be removed. Existing transactions keep their categories.

advanced.label: Advanced (regex)
advanced.hint: Match with a regular expression instead of a simple text contains.

pattern.containsHint: Transactions whose text contains this value get the category below.
pattern.regexHint: A regular expression evaluated by the backend.

import.title: Import transactions
import.description: Upload a CSV from your bank, map its columns, review, and import.

account.label: Account
account.hint: All imported transactions go to this account.

file.label: CSV file
file.hint: A comma- or semicolon-separated file exported from your bank.

upload.parseError: Couldn't read that file. Make sure it's a valid CSV export.
upload.tooManyRows: That file has {count} rows — the limit is {max} per import. Split it and import in batches.
upload.parsed: {rows, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} · {columns, plural, one {# column} other {# columns}}

map.description: Match each CSV column to a transaction field. Date and amount are required.
map.requiredHint: Map a Date and an Amount column to continue.
map.violations: {count, plural, one {# row exceeds a field-length limit} other {# rows exceed a field-length limit}}. Fix the source file and re-upload.

preview.includedErrorsHint: Some selected rows have errors and can't be imported. Deselect them to continue.
preview.commit: Import {count, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}}

done.title: Import complete
done.imported: {count, plural, one {# transaction imported} other {# transactions imported}}
done.duplicates: {count, plural, one {# duplicate skipped} other {# duplicates skipped}}

suggestions.title: Save as rules?
suggestions.description: Create rules from this import to auto-categorize next time.
suggestions.capHint: You've reached the enabled-rule limit. Disable a rule to add more.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Keep track of subscriptions and the charges you expect. Nothing here charges your account — link real transactions as they appear.

stateMenu.trialDialogDescription: Moving {name} to trial — when does the trial end?

empty.title: No subscriptions
empty.description: Add a subscription to see its expected charges on the board and calendars.

form.title: Add subscription
form.description: Track expected charges for a subscription. This never books or moves money.

expectedAmount.label: Expected amount
expectedAmount.hint: The amount you expect each charge to be — used for predictions only.

account.label: Account
account.hint: Optional — helps match transactions to this subscription.

schedule.title: Payment schedule
schedule.description: The months each subscription is expected to charge this year. Predictions only — cancelled subscriptions are not shown.

empty.title: Nothing scheduled
empty.description: Add a subscription to see its expected charge months here.
